Remarks/Remarques: New rating model developed for 2024 & 2025, based on major control changes that occurred during high water period in summer 2023.

Measurements have been plotting negative with respect to rating model 12.000 since 2022. The soft banks have visibly slumped in the last few years, and a new rating model was developed to better represent the new control conditions.
New rating curve with one segment. Used of mmt from 2011 to 2019 with more weighted on mmt using ADCP (2017-2019) and flowtracker technology. Used of few historial mmt for high end.
Extended Rating 11.0 to encompass 2011 high water
